_doc: Data synthesis control — canonical/ is the single source of truth

GAME.notes: v5: removed 1026 qwen3-max distillation entries (Chinese thinks + inferior action quality). GPT-5.4 re-distillation in progress for goofspiel, leduc_poker, liars_dice, hex, clobber. Bot data retained for all 7 games.
GAME.audit: 2026-03-20: v5 cleanup. 4657→3631 (-1026 qwen3-max). GPT-5.4 distillation running (~160 wins so far). HF NOT yet synced — awaiting distillation completion.

NAVWORLD.notes: D16: +124 V2 GPT-5.4 (intercity 50, single_poi 46, business 28). V2 pipeline, all high-quality. Total GPT-5.4 = 225. Grand total = 2849.

SWE-INFINITE.notes: REPLACING SWE-SYNTH. Distillation running on GPU machine. 8/25 tasks complete, 8 score=1.0 (all Go). ~37% success rate. ETA ~15h for full 345.
SWE-INFINITE.audit: 2026-03-20: batch running task 25/345 on 4xH200. 8 trajectories collected (all Go, avg 8.3 turns, 26K chars). Format validated.

LIVEWEB.notes: 365 entries. v6 batch: +24 gpt-5.4 distill (16 stooq, 8 coingecko, all score=1.0). Plugin coverage: coingecko 317, stooq 31, taostats 4, openlibrary 4, unknown 9. prepare-data uses _normalize_tool_calls_qwen3().
LIVEWEB.audit: 2026-03-20: v6 gpt-5.4 batch merged. 341+24=365. HF synced.
